title: Warm up
content: The slide presents a visual comparison of three cities: Beijing, Chongqing, and Hangzhou. It highlights different aspects of each city from a driver's perspective. Various elements such as infrastructure and technology are depicted.
key_claims: Chongqing: Scenic drive through traditional architecture
Hangzhou: Use of technology in driving

title: AN EVOLVING NATION
content: This slide introduces the theme of examining an evolving nation by highlighting a 'Ride Through China'. It features images of taxis and iconic architecture, suggesting a journey through different cities.
key_claims: Cultural and architectural diversity in China

title: Session 1 Match the City Chain!
content: The slide outlines a process of investigating and researching cities through local features, development strategies, and positive outcomes. It provides a visual representation of urban development.
key_claims: Local Features lead to Development Strategies
Development Strategies result in Outcomes & Positive Impact

title: Match the city to its development strategy
content: This slide connects specific cities to their respective development strategies. Beijing is linked with technology and tradition integration, Chongqing with sustainable urban development, and Hangzhou with tourism and economic growth.

title: Through the eyes of taxi drivers...
content: The slide reflects on the development strategies of cities from the perspective of taxi drivers. It emphasizes each city's unique strategy based on local features for promoting development.
